description: Style NoteLightweight knit inner T-shirt from hanes is crafted with a soft fabric that allows the tee to contour your silhouette and help you stretch in ease. Wear this under your basic shirts to keep away the monsoon chill and prevent sweaty armpits what's more the printed brand label on the inner neck provides abrasion-free comfortProduct DetailsWhite crew neck inner tee with Stretch and Shape Retention technology (does not show under a shirt)Engineered with unique Moisture Management technology to keep you cool and dryHas short sleeves, a contoured body Fit and a seamless body and is taglessMaterial and Care100% combed cottonMachine wash warm with like coloursTumble dry low
